company.name: Apex Sportswear Industries
company.tagline: Engineered for Performance. Built for the World.
company.description: A leading sportswear manufacturer based in Sialkot, Pakistan, specializing in OEM/ODM custom team uniforms, compression wear, fightwear, and athletic apparel for global brands and clubs. With over 18 years of export experience, we deliver precision-engineered sportswear to 35+ countries.

capabilities.description: Vertically integrated manufacturing from fabric sourcing to finished product, with in-house sublimation, embroidery, cut-and-sew, and quality assurance. Our facility houses modern German and Japanese machinery operated by skilled craftsmen with decades of experience.

products.name: Football Kits
products.description: Custom sublimation-printed football uniforms with moisture-wicking polyester. Full kit options include jersey, shorts, and socks. FIFA-compliant materials available.

products.name: Cricket Apparel
products.description: Professional cricket uniforms including playing kits, training wear, and team travel gear. UV-protective fabrics with moisture management technology.

products.name: Boxing Equipment
products.description: Professional boxing shorts, robes, gloves, and protective gear manufactured to international competition standards. Trusted by promoters worldwide.

products.name: MMA & Fightwear
products.description: Mixed martial arts shorts, rashguards, and gi uniforms designed for durability and freedom of movement. Competition-ready construction.

products.name: Running Apparel
products.description: Performance running shirts, shorts, tights, and jackets with reflective details and ergonomic design. Engineered for all running disciplines.

products.name: Gym & Fitness Wear
products.description: Men's and women's training apparel including tank tops, leggings, shorts, and sports bras. Squat-proof, sweat-wicking fabrics.

products.name: Basketball Uniforms
products.description: Full basketball uniform sets with sublimation printing, mesh construction, and team customization. Jersey and short sets.

products.name: Martial Arts Uniforms
products.description: Karate, taekwondo, judo, and kung fu uniforms with reinforced stitching and competition-grade construction.

products.name: Sports Accessories
products.description: Bags, headbands, wristbands, shin guards, socks, and other sportswear accessories with custom branding available.

products.name: Compression Wear
products.description: Performance compression tights, tops, and sleeves with graduated compression zones for athletic recovery and performance.

specialConditions: DDP shipping to USA, UK, EU, Australia, Canada

testimonials.quote: Outstanding quality and communication. Our custom team kits arrived on time and exceeded expectations. Apex is a reliable long-term partner.
testimonials.author: Marcus Weber

testimonials.quote: We have been sourcing boxing equipment from Apex for 5 years. Consistent quality, competitive pricing, and they understand our market.
testimonials.author: James Mitchell

testimonials.quote: The sublimation printing quality is world-class. Our fitness brand's custom leggings are bestsellers, thanks to Apex's manufacturing.
testimonials.author: Sarah Al-Hassan
